howItWorks.intro: This basketball per calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Simplified PER
rules.formula: PER = (Pts + Reb×1.2 + Ast×1.5 + Stl×2 + Blk×2 - TO) / Min × 36

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What is a good PER?
faq.answer: League average is 15. Above 20 is All-Star level, above 25 is MVP caliber.

faq.question: Is this the official PER formula?
faq.answer: This is a simplified version. The official PER uses pace adjustments and league averages.

faq.question: Is the Basketball PER Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard sports analytics formulas trusted by athletes, coaches, and fans. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What points should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate points value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the Basketball PER Calculator?
sections.body: The Basketball PER Calculator is a free online tool designed for athletes, coaches, and fans who need quick, accurate calculations in the sports analytics space. By entering your points, rebounds, assists, you get instant results including simplified per, rating. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting simplified per right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In sports analytics, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by athletes, coaches, and fans worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to analyze performance with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your points and need to find the right simplified per. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Points
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your points — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: rebounds, assists, steals, blocks, turnovers, minutes per game. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your simplified per, rating. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.
